# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure CI/CD with Comprehensive Logging

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  NODE_ENV: production
  LOG_LEVEL: debug

jobs:
  secure-build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Log Safe Environment Information
        run: |
          echo "=== Workflow Information ==="
          echo "Workflow: ${{ github.workflow }}"
          echo "Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}"
          echo "Run Number: ${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Event: ${{ github.event_name }}"
          echo "Ref: ${{ github.ref }}"
          echo "SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo ""
          echo "=== Runner Information ==="
          echo "OS: ${{ runner.os }}"
          echo "Architecture: ${{ runner.arch }}"
          echo "Runner Name: ${{ runner.name }}"
          echo ""
          echo "=== Safe Environment Variables ==="
          env | grep -v -E '(SECRET|TOKEN|PASSWORD|KEY|CREDENTIAL|API_KEY|AUTH)' | sort

      - name: Validate Input Parameters
        run: |
          echo "=== Input Validation ==="
          
          BRANCH_NAME="${{ github.ref_name }}"
          if [[ ! "$BRANCH_NAME" =~ ^[a-zA-Z0-9/_-]+$ ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Invalid branch name format"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Branch name validated: $BRANCH_NAME"
          
          COMMIT_SHA="${{ github.sha }}"
          if [[ ! "$COMMIT_SHA" =~ ^[a-f0-9]{40}$ ]]; then
            echo "ERROR: Invalid commit SHA format"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Commit SHA validated: $COMMIT_SHA"

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: |
          echo "=== Installing Dependencies ==="
          npm ci --loglevel=verbose 2>&1 | tee npm-install.log
          echo ""
          echo "=== Dependency Tree (Production Only) ==="
          npm list --production --depth=0

      - name: Run Security Audit
        run: |
          echo "=== Security Audit ==="
          npm audit --audit-level=moderate || true
          echo ""
          echo "=== Checking for Known Vulnerabilities ==="
          npx audit-ci --moderate || true

      - name: Run Tests with Coverage
        run: |
          echo "=== Running Tests ==="
          npm test -- --coverage --verbose 2>&1 | tee test-output.log
          echo ""
          echo "=== Test Summary ==="
          cat test-output.log | grep -E "(PASS|FAIL|Tests:|Suites:)" || true

      - name: Build Application
        run: |
          echo "=== Building Application ==="
          npm run build 2>&1 | tee build-output.log
          echo ""
          echo "=== Build Artifacts ==="
          ls -lah dist/ || ls -lah build/ || echo "No standard build directory found"

      - name: Configure AWS Credentials (Secure)
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_ROLE_ARN }}
          role-session-name: GitHubActions-${{ github.run_id }}
          aws-region: us-east-1
          mask-aws-account-id: true

      - name: Verify AWS Configuration
        run: |
          echo "=== AWS Configuration Verification ==="
          echo "AWS Region: $AWS_REGION"
          echo "AWS Account ID: $(aws sts get-caller-identity --query Account --output text | sed 's/\(.\{4\}\).*/\1****/')"
          echo "Assumed Role: $(aws sts get-caller-identity --query Arn --output text | sed 's/\(.*\/\)\(.*\)/\1[REDACTED]/')"

      - name: Prepare Deployment Package
        run: |
          echo "=== Creating Deployment Package ==="
          TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
          PACKAGE_NAME="app-${TIMESTAMP}-${{ github.sha }}.zip"
          
          zip -r "$PACKAGE_NAME" dist/ package.json package-lock.json -x "*.git*" "*.env*" "*node_modules*"
          
          echo "Package created: $PACKAGE_NAME"
          echo "Package size: $(du -h $PACKAGE_NAME | cut -f1)"
          echo "PACKAGE_NAME=$PACKAGE_NAME" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Deploy to Staging (Secure)
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop'
        run: |
          echo "=== Deploying to Staging Environment ==="
          
          DEPLOYMENT_ID=$(uuidgen)
          echo "Deployment ID: $DEPLOYMENT_ID"
          
          aws s3 cp "$PACKAGE_NAME" "s3://${{ secrets.STAGING_BUCKET }}/deployments/$PACKAGE_NAME" \
            --server-side-encryption AES256 \
            --metadata "deployment-id=$DEPLOYMENT_ID,commit-sha=${{ github.sha }},branch=${{ github.ref_name }}"
          
          echo "Package uploaded successfully"
          echo "S3 URI: s3://${{ secrets.STAGING_BUCKET }}/deployments/$PACKAGE_NAME"
          
          echo "=== Triggering Application Deployment ==="
          RESPONSE=$(aws lambda invoke \
            --function-name staging-deployer \
            --payload "{\"package\":\"$PACKAGE_NAME\",\"deploymentId\":\"$DEPLOYMENT_ID\"}" \
            --log-type Tail \
            response.json 2>&1)
          
          echo "Lambda Response (sanitized):"
          cat response.json | jq 'del(.credentials, .tokens, .secrets, .apiKeys, .connectionStrings)' || cat response.json
          
          echo ""
          echo "=== Deployment Verification ==="
          sleep 10
          HEALTH_CHECK=$(curl -sf "https://staging.example.com/health" || echo "Health check failed")
          echo "Health check result: $HEALTH_CHECK"

      - name: Deploy to Production (Secure)
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        run: |
          echo "=== Deploying to Production Environment ==="
          
          DEPLOYMENT_ID=$(uuidgen)
          echo "Deployment ID: $DEPLOYMENT_ID"
          echo "Commit SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Deployed by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          
          aws s3 cp "$PACKAGE_NAME" "s3://${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_BUCKET }}/deployments/$PACKAGE_NAME" \
            --server-side-encryption aws:kms \
            --ssekms-key-id "${{ secrets.KMS_KEY_ID }}" \
            --metadata "deployment-id=$DEPLOYMENT_ID,commit-sha=${{ github.sha }},deployed-by=${{ github.actor }}"
          
          echo "Package uploaded to production bucket"
          
          echo "=== Initiating Blue-Green Deployment ==="
          RESPONSE=$(aws lambda invoke \
            --function-name production-deployer \
            --payload "{\"package\":\"$PACKAGE_NAME\",\"deploymentId\":\"$DEPLOYMENT_ID\",\"strategy\":\"blue-green\"}" \
            --log-type Tail \
            response.json 2>&1)
          
          echo "Deployment Response (sanitized):"
          cat response.json | jq 'del(.credentials, .tokens, .secrets, .apiKeys, .connectionStrings, .passwords)' || cat response.json
          
          echo ""
          echo "=== Post-Deployment Verification ==="
          for i in {1..5}; do
            echo "Health check attempt $i/5..."
            if curl -sf "https://api.example.com/health"; then
              echo "Production health check passed"
              break
            fi
            sleep 10
          done

      - name: Run Smoke Tests
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "=== Running Smoke Tests ==="
          
          ENVIRONMENT=$([[ "${{ github.ref }}" == "refs/heads/main" ]] && echo "production" || echo "staging")
          BASE_URL=$([[ "$ENVIRONMENT" == "production" ]] && echo "https://api.example.com" || echo "https://staging.example.com")
          
          echo "Testing environment: $ENVIRONMENT"
          echo "Base URL: $BASE_URL"
          
          echo "Test 1: Health endpoint"
          curl -sf "$BASE_URL/health" | jq '.' || echo "Health check failed"
          
          echo "Test 2: Version endpoint"
          curl -sf "$BASE_URL/version" | jq 'del(.internalConfig)' || echo "Version check failed"
          
          echo "Test 3: API availability"
          STATUS=$(curl -sf -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$BASE_URL/api/status")
          echo "API Status Code: $STATUS"

      - name: Log Deployment Metrics
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "=== Deployment Metrics ==="
          echo "Workflow Duration: ${{ job.status }}"
          echo "Timestamp: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
          echo "Deployment Status: ${{ job.status }}"
          
          if [ -f build-output.log ]; then
            echo "Build Duration: $(grep -oP 'Done in \K[0-9.]+' build-output.log || echo 'N/A')s"
          fi
          
          if [ -f test-output.log ]; then
            echo "Test Results: $(grep -oP 'Tests:.*' test-output.log || echo 'N/A')"
          fi

      - name: Upload Logs as Artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-logs-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: |
            *.log
            response.json
          retention-days: 30

      - name: Notify Deployment Status
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "=== Deployment Summary ==="
          echo "Status: ${{ job.status }}"
          echo "Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo "Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}"
          
          STATUS_EMOJI=$([[ "${{ job.status }}" == "success" ]] && echo "✅" || echo "❌")
          echo "$STATUS_EMOJI Deployment ${{ job.status }}"

      - name: Cleanup Sensitive Data
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "=== Cleaning up temporary files ==="
          rm -f response.json
          rm -f *.zip
          echo "Cleanup completed"
